claim_decision_delta.reason: The retained h600 exposure sidecar now carries interaction_exposure_share, robot_motion_share_before_first_clearance, first_clearance_step, and low_exposure_success at episode-row level, but all retained rows are explicitly not derivable from missing trace payloads; wait-it-out exclusions or caveats still cannot be mapped to claim-decision changes.
